mapper.select: SELECT id, event_type AS eventType, biz_type AS bizType, enabled, recipient_mode AS recipientMode, min_role_level AS minRoleLevel, template_key AS templateKey, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_notify_rule ORDER BY biz_type, event_type

SELECT id, event_type AS eventType, biz_type AS bizType, enabled, recipient_mode AS recipientMode, min_role_level AS minRoleLevel, template_key AS templateKey, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_notify_rule WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notify_rule SET enabled = #{enabled}, recipient_mode = #{recipientMode}, min_role_level = #{minRoleLevel}, template_key = #{templateKey}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_key AS templateKey, title_tpl AS titleTpl, content_tpl AS contentTpl, enabled, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_notify_template ORDER BY template_key
SELECT id, template_key AS templateKey, title_tpl AS titleTpl, content_tpl AS contentTpl, enabled, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_notify_template WHERE template_key = #{templateKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notify_template SET title_tpl = #{titleTpl}, content_tpl = #{contentTpl}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, module, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, value_type AS valueType, remark, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_system_config WHERE module = #{module} ORDER BY config_key
SELECT DISTINCT module FROM sys_system_config UNION SELECT DISTINCT module FROM sys_system_config_def ORDER BY module
SELECT id, module, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, value_type AS valueType, remark, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_system_config WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, module, config_key AS configKey, label_zh AS labelZh, description, value_type AS valueType, options_json AS optionsJson, default_value AS defaultValue, is_sensitive AS isSensitive, requires_restart AS requiresRestart, is_public AS isPublic, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_system_config_def WHERE module = #{module} ORDER BY config_key

SELECT id, module, config_key AS configKey, label_zh AS labelZh, description, value_type AS valueType, options_json AS optionsJson, default_value AS defaultValue, is_sensitive AS isSensitive, requires_restart AS requiresRestart, is_public AS isPublic, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_system_config_def WHERE is_public = 1 ORDER BY module, config_key
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_system_config SET config_value = #{configValue}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_system_config(module, config_key, config_value, value_type, remark, update_time) VALUES (#{module}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{valueType}, #{remark}, NOW())
INSERT INTO sys_system_config_audit(config_id, module, config_key, old_value, new_value, operator_id) VALUES (#{configId}, #{module}, #{configKey}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, #{operatorId})
